# Bayou Sips
> Bayou Sips rents self-serve frozen drink machines for weddings, birthdays, showers, graduations, corporate events, and backyard cookouts. Three flat-rate packages from $175 to $400 with delivery and setup included. Sip. Chill. Enjoy.

## Core Page
- [Bayou Sips](/): The full Bayou Sips website. Compare rental packages, browse the flavor menu, view event types we cater, learn how booking works, read the FAQ, and book your event date with payment through the booking calendar.

## Rental Packages
- The Mini ($175): Includes 1 self-serve cart, 1 single-spout frozen drink machine, 1 flavor of your choice, and 50 (9oz) plastic cups. Best for intimate parties and a single signature flavor. Indoor or covered outdoor use.
- The Original ($250): Includes 1 self-serve cart, 1 double-spout frozen drink machine, 2 flavors of your choice, 100 (9oz) plastic cups, and a white tent for all-day outdoor use. Most popular package for ~100 guests.
- The Deluxe ($400): Includes 1 self-serve cart, 1 double-spout frozen drink machine, 4 flavors of your choice, 200 (9oz) plastic cups, and a white tent for all-day outdoor use. Best for weddings and large events of ~200 guests.

## Flavor Menu (23 flavors)
- Fruity Favorites: Banana, Blue Raspberry, Cherry Bomb, Green Apple, Mango, Orange, Peach, Strawberry, Strawberry Banana, Watermelon.
- Tropical Escapes: Blue Hawaiian, Goombay Smash, Mai Tai, Pina Colada, Rum Runner, Tropical Knockout.
- Cocktail Classics: Feeling No Pain, Frose, Hurricane, Liquid Mary, Margarita, Sangria.
- Summer Refreshers: Summertime Lemonade.

## Crowd-Favorite Flavor Combos
- Strawberry + Pina Colada.
- Mango + Margarita.
- Peach + Hurricane.
- Blue Raspberry + Watermelon.

## Events We Cater
- Weddings and receptions.
- Birthday parties (kids and adults).
- Baby showers, bridal showers, and engagement parties.
- Graduation parties.
- Corporate and holiday parties.
- Backyard cookouts and family gatherings.

## How Booking Works
1. Pick a package: The Mini, The Original, or The Deluxe.
2. Choose your flavors from the 23-item flavor menu.
3. Click Book & Pay on the Bayou Sips website. The booking calendar (powered by Cal.com) opens, you pick an available date, share your event details, and pay the full rental amount upfront through Stripe. Confirmation arrives by email immediately.
4. Bayou Sips delivers and sets up the cart, machine, cups, and tent. Guests pour their own drinks.

## Direct Booking Links
- The Mini ($175): https://cal.com/bayou.sips1/bayou-sips-the-mini
- The Original ($250): https://cal.com/bayou.sips1/bayou-sips-the-original
- The Deluxe ($400): https://cal.com/bayou.sips1/bayou-sips-the-deluxe

## What You Need at Booking
- Event date and start time.
- Event type (wedding, birthday, shower, graduation, corporate, cookout, etc.).
- Approximate guest count.
- Flavor picks from the menu (1 flavor for The Mini, 2 for The Original, 4 for The Deluxe).
- Event address for delivery and setup.
- Phone number for day-of coordination.

## What Happens After Payment
- Stripe processes the full rental amount and confirms the date instantly.
- A confirmation email is sent within minutes.
- Bayou Sips follows up by email to lock flavors and delivery timing.
- On the event day, Bayou Sips delivers, sets up the cart and machine (and tent for The Original or The Deluxe), and leaves the pouring to guests.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- Pricing: Three flat rentals at $175 (Mini), $250 (Original), and $400 (Deluxe).
- Alcohol: All flavors are alcohol-free by default. You may add your own spirits to create signature cocktails.
- Flavor count: 1 flavor with The Mini, 2 with The Original, 4 with The Deluxe.
- Tent: Included with The Original and The Deluxe. Not included with The Mini.
- Booking: Choose a package, click Book & Pay, pick your date on the calendar, share event details, and pay the full rental upfront to confirm.
- Service area, cancellation, weather backup, and delivery details: confirmed by email after booking.
